name: Orfevre || The Golden Tyrant
description:
"Those who stand before me will know of my might. Those who stand against me shall be crushed by my supremacy. Kneel and know your place. Beneath me, the king of racing!"

ORFY!!! After the glorious Overlord herself, she is my favorite Uma in the series, so much so that I read all the translated stories she had about her. Her voice actor also did an outstanding job of really making her feel like some tyrant. Why are all orange-haired girls so freaking delulu man?

Artist: Amazing art actually, go follow them

Yap portion: It's a shame that Orfy is literally light years away from getting to Global since she released 6 months ago on JP servers, guess it's time to save for her now since i got my MLB KItasan out of the way.

Next bot: Super Creek (Fr this time we goo goo babies now)
creator: TehManika
